resume.summary: Results-driven Senior Full Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications, design systems, and AI-powered products. Proficient in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure. Passionate about clean architecture, developer experience, and delivering user-centric solutions that pass ATS filters.

experience.description: Lead product engineering for a high-growth fintech platform. Own end-to-end feature delivery, mentor junior engineers, and drive architecture decisions across React, Node, and PostgreSQL.
highlights: Reduced page load time by 40% through code splitting and edge caching
Built a real-time notification system handling 2M+ events per day
Introduced design-system components adopted by 6 product teams

experience.description: Designed and built performant, accessible UI components for a developer tooling suite. Deep expertise in TypeScript, React, and design systems.
highlights: Authored the company's first accessible component library in React and TypeScript
Improved CI/CD pipeline reliability by migrating to GitHub Actions and Playwright
Collaborated with designers to standardize tokens and theming across products

achievements.value: Speaker at ReactConf 2024 — "Design Systems at Scale"
Open-source maintainer of react-ats-hooks (1.2k GitHub stars)

projects.name: AI Resume Optimizer
projects.description: A Next.js application that analyzes resumes for ATS compatibility and provides AI-powered improvement suggestions.
projects.technologies: TypeScript, React, Next.js, OpenAI, Tailwind CSS

targetJob.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
targetJob.description: High-growth fintech platform seeking a senior engineer with React, Node, and PostgreSQL experience.

issues: Summary is strong but could mention one more measurable outcome

Include certification ID or credential URL for verification
Ensure no special characters in contact info that ATS parsers may strip
